summary: Completed static code analysis testing for React Native/Expo ProfileView component modernization. All 11 requirements verified successfully through TypeScript compilation, ESLint checks, and comprehensive code structure analysis.
passed_tests: ESLint passes with zero errors on src/components/ProfileView.tsx
ProfileView imports getLevelFromXP from constants correctly
XP gradient uses T.teal and T.coral brand colors (no hardcoded #00D084 #3B82F6)
Avatar has brand-colored ring with T.teal border and 84px size
Stats row displays catch count, follower count, following count with proper dividers
Level badge shows inline next to username in nameRow with flexDirection: row
All action buttons have minHeight 44px for touch accessibility
Sign out button has 52px minHeight and log-out-outline icon
Catch tiles use LinearGradient overlay instead of solid overlay
No problematic hardcoded colors found (uses centralized T theme colors)
Theme colors T.teal (#D4FF00) and T.coral (#FF5500) properly defined
getLevelFromXP function exists and exported from constants
